chairs.name: Herman Miller Aeron Chair
chairs.description: Breathable full-mesh back with lumbar zone support for all-day comfort.

chairs.name: Everseat Flex 7 Pro
chairs.description: Premium bonded leather with a high-back design for executive presence.

chairs.name: Everseat Flex 6 Pro
chairs.description: Iconic 8Z Pellicle mesh distributes weight evenly across seat and back.

chairs.name: Steelcase Leap V2
chairs.description: LiveBack technology adapts to every spinal movement, with 4D arms and lower-back firmness control.

chairs.name: Steelcase Gesture
chairs.description: 360-degree arms engineered to support every posture and device, from laptops to tablets.

chairs.name: Herman Miller Embody
chairs.description: Pixelated support back designed by healthcare professionals to mirror the spine's natural movement.

chairs.name: Herman Miller Sayl
chairs.description: Suspension bridge–inspired design with free-flex zones that move naturally with your body.

chairs.name: Humanscale Freedom Headrest
chairs.description: Self-adjusting recline and a pivoting headrest that automatically follows head movement throughout the day.

chairs.name: Branch Ergonomic Chair
chairs.description: Direct-to-consumer ergonomics competing with premium brands — 4-position tilt-lock and adjustable lumbar.

chairs.name: Knoll Generation Chair
chairs.description: Frameless flexible back supports multiple sitting postures without restricting natural movement.

chairs.name: Haworth Fern
chairs.description: Award-winning frond-inspired design that flexes and moves with the body for dynamic ergonomic support.

chairs.name: Secretlab Titan Evo
chairs.description: Magnetic memory foam head pillow, 4-way adjustable lumbar, and cloud-soft SoftWeave Plus fabric.

chairs.name: IKEA Markus
chairs.description: The budget-friendly ergonomic classic with built-in lumbar support trusted by millions worldwide.

chairs.name: Sihoo M57
chairs.description: Triple-zone breathable mesh back with adjustable headrest, 3D armrests, and dual lumbar support.

chairs.name: Flexispot C7
chairs.description: Premium mesh with 3D flexible back, adjustable lumbar, and 4D armrests at a mid-range price.

chairs.name: Razer Iskur
chairs.description: Built-for-gamers ergonomics with multi-layer synthetic leather and fully adjustable lumbar curve.

chairs.name: Ticova Ergonomic Chair
chairs.description: S-shaped lumbar support system with 11 adjustability points, ideal for varied body types.

chairs.name: OdinLake Nuova L1
chairs.description: WireControl lumbar system and FlexBreath mesh rated for 15 years of daily use at 8+ hours.

chairs.name: Duramont Ergonomic Chair
chairs.description: Fully adjustable headrest and lumbar support with reinforced nylon base rated for up to 330 lbs.
